Container.Name: homeclaw
Container.Overview: An AI assistant that knows your whole household — your home, your family, and the people in your lives. Not a personal assistant (one person) and not a home automation tool (one building) — it understands the household as a coherent unit. After install, open the web UI to complete setup — API keys, Telegram, WhatsApp, and all other settings are configured there. A one-time setup token is printed to the container logs.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web interface. Open this in your browser after install to complete setup.

Config.Name: Workspaces
Config.Description: Persistent data — household memory, contacts, notes, bookmarks, config. Back this up regularly.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Required for MCP sidecar plugin management (optional)

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Can also be set via web UI at Settings

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: For OpenAI or OpenRouter. Can also be set via web UI at Settings

Config.Name: OpenAI Base URL
Config.Description: Custom endpoint (OpenRouter, Ollama, etc.). Can also be set via web UI

Config.Name: Model
Config.Description: LLM model name. Can also be set via web UI

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: Can also be set via web UI at Settings

Config.Name: Web Password
Config.Description: Set during first-run setup wizard in the web UI
